hero.title: Your Health Journey, Simplified
hero.description: No more confusion about where to go or who to see. NeronaHealth guides you from symptom to recovery with AI-powered insights and seamless care coordination.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.description: Complete healthcare management from your pocket

features.title: AI Symptom Check
features.description: Not sure what's wrong? Describe your symptoms to our AI and get instant analysis with urgency level and care recommendations.

features.title: Find Nearby Care
features.description: Discover verified hospitals and clinics near you. Compare services, pricing, and current wait times before you go.

features.title: Book Appointments
features.description: Schedule appointments with available doctors instantly. Choose your time, specialty, and preferred hospital.

features.title: Digital Records
features.description: Keep all your medical records in one secure place. Access prescriptions, lab results, and visit notes anytime.

features.title: Privacy First
features.description: Your health data is encrypted and protected. You control who sees your information and when.

features.title: Emergency Access
features.description: One-tap emergency request connects you with nearby ambulances. GPS tracking shows exactly when help arrives.

steps.title: Describe Symptoms
steps.description: Tell our AI what you're experiencing in your own words. No medical terminology needed.

steps.title: Get Recommendations
steps.description: Receive urgency level, care type suggestions, and nearby facilities within seconds.

steps.title: Choose Your Care
steps.description: Compare hospitals, see doctor availability, and book appointments that work for your schedule.

steps.title: Track Your Health
steps.description: Access your complete medical history, receive appointment reminders, and manage prescriptions.

cta.title: Start Your Health Journey Today
cta.description: Join 50,000+ patients who have discovered a better way to manage their health in Nigeria.
